General.Name: Raily Aesthetic Medicine Intl Hldg
General.Description: Raily Aesthetic Medicine International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides aesthetic medical services in the People's Republic of China. It operates in three segments: Aesthetic Medical Services, Consulting Services, and Aesthetic Medical Equipment Products. The company offers aesthetic surgery services, including aesthetic surgery services comprising aesthetic surgical procedures performed on various parts of the face or body; minimally invasive aesthetic services, such as aesthetic injection procedures; aesthetic dermatology services that consists of various aesthetic energy-based procedures and photoelectric items; aesthetic dental services that include orthodontics, dental implant, and dental whitening; and aesthetic medical management consulting services. It also provides aesthetic medical equipment products comprising collagen injection products, surgical implants, and aesthetic medical skincare products. In addition, the company owns and operates a network of private for-profit aesthetic medical institutions; and trades in medical equipment. It serves individual retail clients and aesthetic medical institutions. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, the People's Republic of China. Raily Aesthetic Medicine International Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Ruide Consultation Limited.
